problem id: b158ab98
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  10001100 -> 00000000
  01111000 -> 00000010
  00000010 -> 00000000
  01001001 -> 00000010
  01100101 -> 00000001
  11100011 -> 10000000
  00100111 -> 10000001
  11001000 -> 00000010
  11011000 -> 00000110
  10100011 -> 10000000

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 00000001
